# Contributing to XGIC GitLab GraphQL Client

Thank you for your interest.

## Process
- Follow GitHub Flow.
- All work via Pull Requests to main.
- Detailed Conventional Commits.
- Squash related changes.

## Review Gate (Mandatory)
**Review and approval required before any remote action or merge to main — see AGENTS.md and BASE-STANDARDS-FOR-ORCHESTRATED-REPOS.md.**

Human performs review/approval in GitHub web UI.

## Coding Standards
- Python 3.12+
- Ruff + Pyright + pytest
- XGIC CLI standard + no Makefiles noted throughout.
- Positive framing.
- Complete all fields in issues/PRs (assignees, labels).

## Reporting Status (Grok)
Use exact Session ID "XGIC GitLab GraphQL Client".

See AGENTS.md for full collaboration rules.
